sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45505" key="eu)xrhmate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐχρημᾰτ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n45505.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be wealthy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.109</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:196" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.196</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
